title: rubus tilioides
intro: Rubus tilioides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, Rubus tilioides has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and wounds, thanks to its health benefits of promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting infections. Rubus tilioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
